_note: The 7 childless royal marriages that were floating unconnected in the source. A union dot marks the marriage; 0 children is valid. All documented, no invented issue.

families.note: Richard the Lionheart & Berengaria of Navarre, childless
Henry II HRE & Cunigunde, childless (both later canonised)
Louis the Younger & Liutgard of Saxony, no surviving issue
